message:
fix(bus): processNext while loop, required signal, await publish, clear interrupts

Round 8 review fixes:

1. Replace recursive processNext() with while loop to prevent stack
   overflow under burst of continue messages to shared agents.

2. Make idleLoop signal parameter required — shared agents need it to
   exit. runAgentProcess throws if a shared agent has no signal.

3. Await bus.publish in messageAgent steer/continue paths to surface
   errors instead of creating unhandled rejections.

4. /clear now calls interrupt() first so the running agent stops
   before history is reset, preventing history contamination.

5. clearHandles uses fire-and-forget unsubscribe (like shutdown) so
   a mid-iteration bus disconnect doesn't abort remaining cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
